query: SELECT id, LEFT(razaoSocial, 30) as empresa, CASE WHEN logoUrl IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN logoUrl = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE LEFT(logoUrl, 80) END as logo FROM companies WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
